A CHAR 3 This is the first ICD code indicating the etiologic problem that led to the condition for which the patient is
receiving rehabilitation.
228 INDVDL_PT_WK_1_NUM INDVDL_PT_WK_1_NUM O0401AA PT: Total Minutes Individual Therapy Week 1 NUM 22 This indicates the total number of individual physical therapy minutes provided in the first week of stay.
